_comment: N-Xyme MIND Skill Pool Catalog — maps every former agent to a skill definition

prometheus.name: Prometheus
prometheus.description: Detailed plan generation from goals. Creates ordered, verified execution plans with task dependencies and acceptance criteria.

metis.name: Metis
metis.description: Pre-planning consultant. Surfaces hidden assumptions, AI failure points, overlooked edge cases, and risky decisions.

agent-builder.name: Agent Builder
agent-builder.description: Meta-agent creation from task descriptions. Uses templates for structure, meta-prompting for content. 5-phase protocol: Classify → Shell → Generate → Validate → Register.

oracle.name: Oracle
oracle.description: Read-only architecture consultant. Deep analysis of system architecture, design decisions, and code structure. Never writes code.

architect.name: System Architect
architect.description: MERGED WITH ORACLE. Full system awareness — reads live source files, maps architecture, detects changes. Redundant with Oracle skill.

scalpel.name: Scalpel
scalpel.description: Code decomposition & understanding. Decompose → Understand → Extract → Frankenstein Stitch → Architect freely. For complex codebases.

sisyphus-junior.name: Sisyphus Junior
sisyphus-junior.description: Quick, simple code changes. Fast edits on 1-2 files, config changes, documentation writes. For tasks that don't need deep reasoning.

mr-white.name: Mr. White
mr-white.description: Chemistry lab procedures & safety. Hazard check, PPE check, procedure review, waste disposal, emergency planning.

explore.name: Explore
explore.description: Codebase search & pattern finding. Uses semantic search, grep, glob to find patterns, files, and implementations across the codebase.
explore.output_format: search results with file paths and snippets

momus.name: Momus
momus.description: Adversarial review (5 lenses: Security, Edge Cases, Maintainability, Performance, Correctness). Brutal, specific, constructive.

librarian.name: Librarian
librarian.description: External web research. Searches docs, OSS code, web for best practices and examples. Synthesizes findings into actionable recommendations.
librarian.output_format: research synthesis with citations and URLs

phi4-reasoner.name: Phi-4 Reasoner
phi4-reasoner.description: Deep multi-step reasoning using ring-2.6-1t-free model. Decompose → Trace → Verify → Synthesize → Self-Critique.
phi4-reasoner.output_format: step-by-step reasoning with intermediate steps shown

cortex.name: Cortex
cortex.description: Memory management pipeline. Ingest sessions → auto-tag → score relevance → semantic dedup → compact vectors → health monitoring.

vision.name: Vision Analyst
vision.description: Visual and media analysis. Analyze images, screenshots, diagrams. Describe UI layouts, charts, and identify patterns.

kairos.name: Kairos
kairos.description: Therapy protocol. CBT, ADHD coaching, executive function scaffolding, RSD-safe communication, trauma-informed care. NEVER diagnoses — describes patterns.

jarvis.name: Jarvis
jarvis.description: General personal assistance. Handles queries, delegates to specialists when needed, maintains context. User's persistent personal interface.

masterplan.name: Masterplan
masterplan.reason: Fully merged into Atlas - Plan Executor. All functionality (nx-masterplan-track, sprint tracking) exists in Atlas.

atlas.name: Atlas - Plan Executor
atlas.protocol: Sprint Plan → Track → Execute Story → Report

protocol_flow.sisyphus_to_hephaestus: When Sisyphus classifies [code], delegates directly to Hephaestus with structured prompt (files + criteria + context).
protocol_flow.sisyphus_to_atlas: When Sisyphus classifies [track] or completes [plan] phase, delegates execution tracking to Atlas with plan document.
protocol_flow.sisyphus_to_hermes: When Sisyphus classifies [memory] or [therapy], delegates to Hermes for knowledge/personal support.
protocol_flow.hephaestus_to_skills: Hephaestus loads Scalpel (complex code), Sisyphus Junior (simple edits), Mr. White (chemistry) as needed during Build phase.
protocol_flow.atlas_to_hephaestus: During bmad-dev-story execution, Atlas delegates code tasks to Hephaestus.
protocol_flow.hermes_to_skills: Hermes loads Kairos (therapy), Jarvis (assistance), Cortex (memory), Librarian (research), Vision (images) as needed during Support phase.
protocol_flow.parallel_execution: Independent sub-tasks are executed simultaneously via call_omo_agent. Dependent tasks use delegate_task chain.
